# BEST-Route — External Baseline

**Paper:** "Adaptive LLM Routing with Test-Time Optimal Compute"

**Official code:** https://github.com/best-route/best-route

## Setup

When ready to integrate:

```bash
cd external/best_route
git clone https://github.com/best-route/best-route .repo
# follow their install instructions
```

The wrapper at `src/baselines/external/best_route_wrapper.py` will call into this code.

## Status

Placeholder only. Integration not yet started.
